mapper.insert: INSERT INTO music (title, artist, album, file_url, preview_url, duration, genre, lyrics, features, cover_url, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{artist}, #{album}, #{fileUrl}, #{previewUrl}, #{duration}, #{genre}, #{lyrics}, #{features}, #{coverUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM music WHERE status = 1 AND features IS NOT NULL ORDER BY play_count DESC, like_count DESC, update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(genre), ''), '未分类') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM music GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(genre), ''), '未分类') ORDER BY value DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit}
